title: Are UFOs Looking For Our NUKES?
summary: This interview excerpt discusses the 1967 Malmstrom Air Force Base incident where Captain Robert Salas witnessed a UFO allegedly disabling nuclear missiles. It references journalist Robert Hastings' documentation of over 100 similar cases of UFO-nuclear facility encounters.

events.description: At Malmstrom nuclear facility in Montana, Captain Robert Salas witnessed a red glowing UFO hovering over nuclear missiles, after which the warheads were rendered completely inoperable

key_claims.claim: A red glowing object hovered over nuclear missiles at Malmstrom Air Force Base and allegedly disabled them
Captain Robert Salas was operating an underground control center capable of deploying 10 80-kiloton nuclear warheads
Robert Hastings has documented over 100 cases of UFO-nuclear facility encounters in his book 'UFOs and Nukes'
